message:
content: reorder hero body text to prioritize tools and consulting

Restructured hero introduction to better reflect current focus and value proposition:

Previous Order:
1. Lumera Network (infrastructure)
2. Tools (SmartEdgar, MCP Agent Mail, etc.)

New Order:
1. Tools and open-source ecosystem (SmartEdgar, MCP Agent Mail, Ultimate Bug Scanner)
2. Consulting services (PE/hedge funds, AI automation, long/short equity background)
3. Lumera Network (founded and run)

Rationale:
- Leads with immediate value: practical tools users can engage with now
- Highlights consulting expertise and hedge fund background earlier
- Positions Lumera as foundational work rather than primary pitch
- "And I consult" creates natural flow between tools and infrastructure
- "I also founded and run" ties back to leadership while de-emphasizing as lead

Content Changes (lib/content.ts):
- Split original two paragraphs into three focused statements
- Removed em-dash, simplified punctuation for clarity
- Changed "I run" to "I also founded and run" (acknowledges but de-emphasizes)
- Added explicit consulting value prop with specific audience (PE/hedge funds)
- Maintained all key information, just reordered for better narrative flow

Impact:
- Visitors immediately see practical deliverables (tools)
- Financial services background surfaced earlier (credibility)
- Clearer value proposition for potential consulting clients
- Lumera Network still prominently featured but in proper context
- Better matches actual current work priorities

files.patch:
@@ -53,8 +53,9 @@ export const heroContent = {
   eyebrow: "Founder • Engineer • Former Hedge Fund Analyst",
   title: "Building the tools that sit between markets and frontier AI.",
   body: [
-    "I run Lumera Network (formerly Pastel Network), a Cosmos-based L1 for storage, AI, and interoperability.",
-    "I also build tools like SmartEdgar, MCP Agent Mail, and Ultimate Bug Scanner—plus an ecosystem of open-source infrastructure for AI agents and serious research workflows.",
+    "I build tools like SmartEdgar, MCP Agent Mail, and Ultimate Bug Scanner, plus an ecosystem of open-source infrastructure for AI agents and serious research workflows.",
+    "And I consult to PE funds and hedge funds about AI automation after a decade as an analyst in the long/short equity hedge fund space.",
+    "I also founded and run Lumera Network (formerly Pastel Network), a Cosmos-based L1 for storage, AI, and interoperability.",
   ],
   primaryCta: {
     label: "Work with me",
